g.text: STM32G030F6P6 TSSOP20 — REWIRE-REQUIRED NOTE (rev 0.1 NOT TO BE FAB'd)

g.desc: STM32G030F6P6 TSSOP20 — REWIRE-REQUIRED NOTE (rev 0.1 NOT TO BE FAB'd)

g.text: Prior symbol had a fabricated pinout (VDD/VDDA split, GPIOs shifted). Fixed

g.desc: Prior symbol had a fabricated pinout (VDD/VDDA split, GPIOs shifted). Fixed

g.text: now to match ST DS12991 Figure 4 / Table 12. Wires below must be re-attached

g.desc: now to match ST DS12991 Figure 4 / Table 12. Wires below must be re-attached

g.text: to the correct pins on U4 before any further work.

g.desc: to the correct pins on U4 before any further work.

g.text: 1 PB7/PB8 -> I2C1 SCL (select PB8; PB7 is NOT used)

g.desc: 1 PB7/PB8 -> I2C1 SCL (select PB8; PB7 is NOT used)

g.text: 6 NRST -> reset (100nF to GND + internal pull-up)

g.desc: 6 NRST -> reset (100nF to GND + internal pull-up)

g.text: 13 PA6 -> Motor EN (TIM16_CH1 PWM 20 kHz to DRV8876)

g.desc: 13 PA6 -> Motor EN (TIM16_CH1 PWM 20 kHz to DRV8876)

g.text: 15 PA8/PB0/PB1/PB2 -> Limit switch (select PA8 as GPIO input)

g.desc: 15 PA8/PB0/PB1/PB2 -> Limit switch (select PA8 as GPIO input)

g.text: 16 PA11[PA9] -> USART1 TX (enable PA11->PA9 remap in SYSCFG_CFGR1)

g.desc: 16 PA11[PA9] -> USART1 TX (enable PA11->PA9 remap in SYSCFG_CFGR1)

g.text: 19 PA15/PA14/BOOT0 -> SWCLK + BOOT0 (pull-down + TP_BOOT0 test pad)

g.desc: 19 PA15/PA14/BOOT0 -> SWCLK + BOOT0 (pull-down + TP_BOOT0 test pad)

g.text: DROPPED vs prior design: PB7 nFAULT (pad 1 now carries PB8 for I2C SCL;

g.desc: DROPPED vs prior design: PB7 nFAULT (pad 1 now carries PB8 for I2C SCL;

g.text: PB7 and PB8 are bonded to the same pad in this package and only one can be

g.desc: PB7 and PB8 are bonded to the same pad in this package and only one can be

g.text: driven at a time). Firmware Read_Hardware_ID() is now dead code.

g.desc: driven at a time). Firmware Read_Hardware_ID() is now dead code.

g.text: Bootloader path: USART1 on pads 16/17 (RS-485 bus) is AN2606-supported.

g.desc: Bootloader path: USART1 on pads 16/17 (RS-485 bus) is AN2606-supported.
